description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior is predominantly white with large, vertically oriented windows and glass doors, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house features a combination of open-plan living areas, private rooms, and a central courtyard or atrium visible from above. There are landscaped green patches at the front and side, as well as a driveway and garage area. The rear of the house includes additional large windows and what appears to be a patio or terrace. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and minimalist white exterior. Features include landscaped areas, a garage, and open-plan living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, landscaped garden, large windows, and visible interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, vertical window strips, and garage area.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional large windows, terrace/patio, and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing driveway, garage entrance, and more green landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips and large picture windows in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with large glass door, minimal steps, and landscaped approach; no porch or columns, emphasizing clean lines.
